name: Gomata Chaat Corner
description: The town's most-loved evening chaat stall. Famous for crispy pani puri, masala puri and sev puri made fresh to order. A must-visit after temple darshan.

name: Vindhyagiri Dosa Point
description: Start your day with hot, crispy masala dosa and filter coffee right where the hill climb begins. Simple, hygienic and quick — perfect for early pilgrims.

name: Bahubali Gobi Manchurian
description: Sizzling gobi manchurian, fried rice and noodles from a lively roadside stall. Generous portions and pocket-friendly prices make it a favourite with students.

name: Namma Juice & Mirchi
description: Fresh fruit juices, tender coconut and hot mirchi bajji to beat the afternoon heat. A refreshing stop near the pond after exploring the town.
